agentStop.bash: if [ $(command -v notify-send) ]; then notify-send --app-name 'GitHub Copilot CLI' 'Agent Stop'; fi
if [ $(command -v toasty.exe) ]; then toasty.exe --app copilot 'Agent Stop'; fi

notification.bash: if [ $(command -v notify-send) ]; then notify-send --app-name 'GitHub Copilot CLI' 'Notification'; fi
if [ $(command -v toasty.exe) ]; then toasty.exe --app copilot 'Notification'; fi
